steps.title: Evaluate each coordinate against the inequality directions
steps.content: At the point $(8, 2)$: the $x$-coordinate is $8$, which satisfies $x > 0$ (since $8 > 0$ is true). The $y$-coordinate is $2$, which satisfies $y > 0$ (since $2 > 0$ is true).

steps.title: Identify the matching system
steps.content: We need both $x > 0$ and $y > 0$ to hold for the point. Looking at the choices, only one system has this exact pair of inequalities. That matches choice A — A is correct.
